final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: needs a complex but organized promotional aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include artistic typography with layered/stacked fonts, must include products or subjects partially overlapping/obscuring some text elements
Subject: must include products or promotional subjects as focal elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional energy — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must maintain visual complexity without appearing cluttered, must include layered/stacked typography, must have subjects overlapping text
Avoid: must avoid visual chaos despite complexity
